steps.title: Graph the two lines
steps.content:
Enter the equations as written. Both lines pass through the origin because each has no constant term:
$$y=-\frac{1}{7}x$$
$$y=\frac{1}{5}x$$

steps.title: Find the shared point
steps.content: The two lines have different slopes, so they intersect only at their shared point, the origin. The $x$-coordinate of that solution is $0$. The answer is C.
